traditional_translations.source: qore-l : Natakamani : qo : mlo : apedmk : mk-se : selele : tenke : to : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of apedmk, King Natakamani apedmk, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk-se : qore-l : Natakamani : kdke-l : Amanitore : qo : mlo : tenke : to : akine : to : selele : pesto-b-ke

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk : qore-l : Amanishakheto : kdke : qo : mlo : pesto-b : tenke : to : akine : to : selele
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni, King amni Amanishakheto akine, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: qore-l-o : Amanishakheto : amni-te : kdke : qo : mlo : apedmk : mk-se : beke : selele : to
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni and apedmk, King Amanishakheto amni apedmk, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: qore-l-o : Tanyidamani : amni-te : qo : mlo-li : apedmk : mk : wos : mk : selele-wi : tenke : to
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni and apedmk and wos, King Tanyidamani amni apedmk wos, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk-se : qore-l : Tanyidamani : mlo : qo : beke-li : pesto-b-ke : to : selele
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni, King amni Tanyidamani, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk : qore-l-o : Tanyidamani : qo : mlo : tenke : to : akine : selele : apedmk : mk-se : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni and apedmk, King amni Tanyidamani akine apedmk, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: qore-l-o : Amanikhabale : amni-te : mlo : qo : apedmk : mk-se : beke-li : tenke : to : selele
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni and apedmk, King Amanikhabale amni apedmk, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: qore-l : Amanitekha : amni-te : qo : mlo : apedmk : mk : wos : mk-se : selele-wi : tenke : to
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni and apedmk and wos, King Amanitekha amni apedmk wos, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk : qore-l-o : Arnekhamani : qo : mlo : beke : apedmk : mk : selele-wi : to
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni and apedmk, King amni Arnekhamani apedmk, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: qore-l : Adikhalamani : amni-te : apedmk : mk-se : qo : mlo : tenke : to : akine : selele : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni and apedmk, King Adikhalamani amni apedmk akine, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk-se : qore-l-o : Adikhalamani : qo : mlo : beke-li : tenke : to : selele : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni, King amni Adikhalamani, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: qore-l : Shanakdakhete : kdke : qo : mlo : amni : mk-se : selele : tenke : to : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni, King Shanakdakhete amni, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: apedmk : mk : qo-se : selele-wi : abr : mlo : beke
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to apedmk by apedmk, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: apedmk : mk : qo : mlo : selele-wi : beke : mke : to
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to apedmk by apedmk, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: apedmk : mk-se : qo : mlo : selele : abr : mlo : pesto-b
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to apedmk by apedmk, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: wos : mk : mhe-se : selele-wi : kdi : mlo : plote-b
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to wos and mhe by wos mhe, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: wos : mk-se : mnp : mk-se : selele : pesto-b-ke : mlo
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to wos and mnp by wos mnp, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: apedmk : mk : qo : sebke : mk : amni : mk-se : selele-wi : qore-l : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of apedmk and sebke and amni, King apedmk sebke amni, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: apedmk : mk-se : qo : mlo : beke : selele : wos : mk : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to apedmk and wos by apedmk wos, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: apedmk : mk-se : qo : mlo : abr : selele-wi : beke
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to apedmk by apedmk, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: apedmk : mk : qo-se : sebke : mk-se : selele-wi : mlo : beke-li : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to apedmk and sebke by apedmk sebke, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk : apedmk : mk : qo : mlo : selele-wi : pesto-b-ke : to
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to amni and apedmk by amni apedmk, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk : qo-se : wos : mk-se : mhe : mk-se : selele : pesto-b-ke : to
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to amni and wos and mhe by amni wos mhe, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk-se : apedmk : mk : selele-wi : mlo-li : pesto-b-ke : to : beke-li
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to amni and apedmk by amni apedmk, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: apedmk : mk : qo : mlo-li : qore-l-o : Natakamani : kdke-l-o : Amanitore : selele-wi : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to apedmk by apedmk Natakamani Amanitore, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: apedmk : mk-se : qo : mlo : wos : mk : selele-wi : abr : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to apedmk and wos by apedmk wos, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk : sebke : mk-se : apedmk : mk : qo : mlo : selele : pesto-b-ke : to
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to amni and sebke and apedmk by amni sebke apedmk, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: qore-l : Yesebokemni : qo : mlo : amni : mk-se : wos : mk : selele-wi : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni and wos, King Yesebokemni amni wos, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: mnp : mk-se : aresnp : mk : selele-wi : mlo : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to mnp and aresnp by mnp aresnp, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: mnp : mk : qo-se : mlo : selele : pesto-b-ke : to
traditional_translations.translation: This temple is dedicated to mnp by mnp, for the protection and prosperity of the land.

traditional_translations.source: wos : mk : Peksemelde : abr : mlqe : lh : mlo : ate-li : yi-s-li : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: An offering which the king gives (for) wos Peksemelde: bread, water, and all good things.

traditional_translations.source: wos-i : mk-i-se : Mntemnoye : kdi : mlo : lh-se : ate-li : yi-s-li : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: An offering which the king gives (for) wos Mntemnoye: bread, water, and all good things.

traditional_translations.source: wos : mk : Aritnekemni : abr : peseto : lh-se : mlo : ate-li : yi-s-li : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: An offering which the king gives (for) wos Aritnekemni: bread, water, and all good things.

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk : qore-l : Harsiotef : qo : mlo : apedmk : mk-se : beke-li : selele : tenke : to : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni and apedmk, King amni Harsiotef apedmk, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.

traditional_translations.source: amni : mk-se : qore-l-o : Nastasen : qo : mlo : tenke : to : akine : to : selele : beke : pesto-b-ke
traditional_translations.translation: By the grace of amni, King amni Nastasen akine, great and good, ruler of the western land and Akine.
